miami.title: Why invest in Miami
miami.copy: Liquid USD market with global demand. Favorable tax environment and sustained growth.
miami.quote: Do not wait to buy properties, buy properties and wait.

precon.title: Pre-construction advantages
precon.copy: Milestone deposits, appreciation during construction, and simple management. Strong USD diversification.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Advisory for Miami real-estate investment
about.bio: I guide investors end-to-end: selection, reservation, contract, due diligence, and closing. ROI focus and capital preservation.

hero.title: Invest in Miami with clear guidance from a trusted local advisor
hero.subtitle: Personal support to evaluate purchases, available properties, pre-construction projects, and financing.

miami.title: Why Miami?
miami.copy: USD-based liquid market with high international demand.

precon.title: Why Pre-construction?
precon.copy: Stage deposits, appreciation during construction, legal security.

band.title: Want to move forward in Miami?
band.copy: Send me the context and we can review the next step together.

financing.title: Financing to buy in Miami with a more complete perspective
financing.seo: Financing for Miami buyers and investors with financial judgment. Options from 25% down payment are subject to review and approval.
financing.intro: Before choosing a property, we review your goal, profile, and documentation to understand which financing options may apply and how they can impact your purchase decision.
financing.judgmentTitle: It is not just about getting a loan. It is about buying with judgment.
financing.judgmentText: Financing can help you access a Miami property without using all your available capital. But every case should be reviewed carefully: property type, buyer profile, reserves, documentation, purchase structure, and investment goal.
financing.programsTitle: Programs that may start from 25% down payment
financing.programsText: In some cases, foreign buyers may access financing alternatives from 25% down payment. Availability depends on the buyer profile, property type, documentation submitted, and financial institution approval.
financing.programsNote: 25% is not a guarantee. It is an initial reference to evaluate possibilities.
financing.reviewTitle: What is usually reviewed before moving forward
requirements: Purchase goal: investment, personal use, or rental.
Funds for down payment and reserves.
Purchase under a personal name or corporate structure.
financing.processTitle: A simple process to make better decisions

steps.d: We define whether you want to invest, buy for personal use, or evaluate a specific opportunity.
We analyze available capital, documentation, and possible financing paths.
Depending on your profile, alternatives are reviewed with the corresponding professionals or financial institutions.
If you move forward, financing is coordinated alongside the search, offer, contract, and closing.

financing.experienceTitle: Real estate experience with financial judgment
financing.experienceText: Jacquie combines her work as a Miami Realtor with more than 15 years of Finance experience in S&P 500 companies.
financing.ctaTitle: Want to know if financing may apply to your purchase?
financing.ctaCopy: Tell me what type of property you are looking for and we can review the best path for your case.
financing.disclaimer: This information is for guidance only. All financing is subject to review, documentation, financial institution approval, property type, and conditions in effect at the time of application.

contact.title: Let’s talk about your next step in Miami real estate
contact.intro: Tell me whether you are considering a purchase, an investment, financing for a purchase, or a specific property, along with the area and stage of your search.
contact.directBody: Share your goal, the area or project that interests you, and where you are in the process. I’ll reply personally.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hi Jacquie, I’d like to discuss a purchase, an investment, financing a purchase, or a specific property in Miami. My goal is...
contact.emailBody: You can also write directly with a real estate inquiry.
contact.formTitle: Share the details of your inquiry
contact.formIntro: This channel is only for questions about buying, investing, financing a purchase, or a specific property.
contact.unavailableTitle: The email form will be available soon
contact.unavailableBody: In the meantime, you can reach me on WhatsApp or by email.
contact.nameInvalid: Enter a name between 2 and 100 characters.
contact.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number with its country code.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Your goal, area or project, and stage of your search
contact.messageInvalid: Your inquiry must be between 10 and 4,000 characters.
contact.privacy: I’ll use these details only to respond to your inquiry. Do not include financial information, documents, or other sensitive data.
contact.validationError: Review the highlighted fields before sending.
contact.rateLimitError: There have been several attempts. Wait a few minutes or use WhatsApp.
contact.notConfiguredError: This channel is not available yet. Use WhatsApp or email.
contact.sendError: We couldn’t send the inquiry. Your details are still here so you can try again or use WhatsApp.
contact.successWithoutRedirect: Your inquiry was sent. We couldn’t open the confirmation page, but you don’t need to send it again.
contact.unexpectedError: We couldn’t send your inquiry. Try again or use WhatsApp.
contact.staysTitle: Is your inquiry about a stay?
contact.staysBody: Stay inquiries are handled separately through Let’s Go Miami, a service of Jacna Services LLC. This form is for real estate inquiries only.

thankYou.confirmedTitle: Thank you, your message was sent
thankYou.confirmedBody: Your real estate inquiry was sent to Jacquie. If you would like to add context, you can also message her on WhatsApp.
thankYou.directTitle: Would you like to speak with Jacquie?
thankYou.directBody: This page can also be opened directly. To start an inquiry, use WhatsApp or return to Contact.
thankYou.confirmedWhatsappMessage: Hi Jacquie, I just sent a real estate inquiry through the site and would like to add...
thankYou.directWhatsappMessage: Hi Jacquie, I’d like to discuss a real estate decision in Miami.
